behavior.miss: createPlayback schedules one playback-priority ensure under playback:<cacheKey>
behavior.loop: a later syncLoop tick creates audio after the exact processed artifact is cached
behavior.sequence: render completion has no callback that replays a past sequence edge
behavior.reverse: reverse misses request reverse semantic readiness before a later edge creates the reverse artifact
behavior.sourceSafety: missing source or missing orbit runtime does not enqueue a playback render

tests.command: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='self-heal|non-replayable|no stale render|stable playback consumer' test/audioEngine.test.ts

manualQa.surface: AudioEngine running against the repository FakeAudioContext/FakeAudioBuffer harness
manualQa.command: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='a pending non-neutral loop schedules one playback render and self-heals on its next transport tick|a pending reverse render keeps sequence edges non-replayable and preserves reverse readiness' test/audioEngine.test.ts
manualQa.observed: A non-neutral loop skips its first miss, renders asynchronously, and starts only on its next tick. A reverse sequence remains silent after completion until a new edge, then creates the reverse cache artifact.

knownLimit: Scene prewarm and residency orchestration are intentionally left to Todos 6-8.
